title: Faraday module pack manifest (pack.json)
description: The contract for a Faraday module pack. A pack is a self-contained folder with this manifest at its root, installed into a lesson by `faraday pack add`. Official packs live in packages/official-packs/; third parties may distribute a pack from any local path, GitHub repo, or npm package.

name.description: Optional. The CLI derives the pack name from its folder; this is documentation only.

displayName.description: Human-readable label shown by `faraday pack list`.

aliasFlags.description: Optional legacy `faraday new` flags this pack backs, e.g. ["--3d"].

runtime.description: The runtime half — merged/copied into the lesson's real project tree.

variants.description: Named optional bundles, selected via `faraday pack add <name> --<variant>`.

cssImports.description: CSS specifiers appended (idempotently) to src/app.css as @import lines.

scaffold.description: Applied ONLY when scaffolding a new lesson (faraday new alias), never on `pack add` into existing work.

skill.description: The skill half — a .md file or a directory copied to .faraday/packs/<name>/ with a pointer added to AGENTS.md.

reference.description: Path (relative to the pack) to a .md file or a directory.

loadWhen.description: Hint templated into the AGENTS.md pointer: "Load it when <loadWhen>."

quality.description: Path (relative to the pack) to a quality-bar markdown file.

from.description: Path relative to the pack (file or directory).

to.description: Path relative to the lesson root.
Lesson-relative file to append to (skipped if absent).

marker.description: If present in the file already, the append is skipped (idempotent).
